mechanics.primary_effect: Grants the effect of the _haste_ spell for 1 minute.
mechanics.mechanical_notes: The effect explicitly states 'no concentration required,' which is a key mechanical feature distinguishing this from the spell.
mechanics.potential_issues: None apparent; standard D&D 5e item implementation.

analysis.archival_notes: The description effectively conveys the mechanical effect, referencing the linked spell (_haste_) while specifying the duration and concentration clause. The flavor text is evocative.
